## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Curation Rationale

Explain why this change improves the repository.

- Why does this resource or edit belong here?
- What existing item is it better than, or what gap does it fill?
- Why is the link stable enough to keep?

## Placement

State where the change belongs and why.

- `README.md`
- `docs/foundations-and-deep-learning.md`
- `docs/transformers-llms-and-rag.md`
- `docs/interpretability-safety-and-human-factors.md`
- `docs/README.md` because a new topic guide is needed

## Validation

- Links checked:
- Existing entries reviewed for duplicates:
- Metadata added or updated:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change follows [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/gr8monk3ys/ai-resources/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] New resources include cost, level, and type metadata
- [ ] Descriptions are short, specific, and avoid ranking language
- [ ] Links point to a paper, official course page, or stable reference when possible
- [ ] The change uses the right placement: main `README.md` for first-choice items, `docs/` for deeper lists
